name: openspec-backlog
description: Ordered backlog ledger + working briefs + autonomous lifecycle runner

commands.name: OPSX+: Backlog
commands.description: Turn messy context into ordered, deduplicated backlog items - a ledger row plus lite working brief per item
commands.argumentHint: free-form context, goals, or research to capture

commands.name: OPSX+: Brief
commands.description: Deepen one backlog item's working brief at pick-up time - codebase-grounded requirements, risks, pointers; deep mode adds web research

commands.name: OPSX+: Next
commands.description: Autonomously process exactly ONE backlog item end-to-end - brief, propose, apply, verify, sync, archive; designed for /loop and /goal
commands.argumentHint: (no arguments — picks the next eligible item)
